features.name: CLAUDE.md templates and scaffolding
features.notes: Anthropic's /init already generates CLAUDE.md. Watch for richer templates that overlap with CDK's tiered scaffolding.

features.name: settings.json managed configuration
features.notes: Anthropic has a managed settings scope. If they ship a configuration wizard or admin console, CDK's scaffolded settings.json loses unique value.

features.name: Hook templates and pre-built hooks
features.notes: CDK wires Stop, SessionStart, PostToolUse hooks. If Anthropic ships pre-configured hook templates, this becomes redundant.

features.name: Built-in or bundled skills
features.notes: CDK ships /commit and /simplify as shallow skills. If Anthropic bundles equivalent skills natively, these lose value.

features.name: Automatic stack or framework detection
features.notes: CDK detects 11 tech stacks to adapt security rules, skills, and permissions. Native stack detection would reduce this advantage.

features.name: Tiered or graduated project setup
features.notes: CDK's four tiers (Discovery/Fast Lane/Standard/Full) are its primary structural differentiator.

features.name: Rule file scaffolding or templates
features.notes: CDK scaffolds pipeline.md, security.md, git.md as rules. If Anthropic ships starter rule templates, this overlap grows.

features.name: Pipeline gates or workflow enforcement
features.notes: CDK's multi-phase pipeline with STOP gates is deep and opinionated. Low absorption risk but monitor for native workflow features.

features.name: Team or org-wide settings enforcement
features.notes: CDK plans team-settings.json for org enforcement. Anthropic has server-managed settings via admin console - watch for expansion.

features.name: Cross-project compliance or analytics
features.notes: CDK's SaaS layer (Q2) aggregates doctor reports across projects. No current Anthropic equivalent.

features.name: Multi-step audit or analysis skills
features.notes: CDK ships 12 deep audit skills with model routing. Single-skill native equivalents are possible but full suite is unlikely.

features.name: Skill registry or marketplace
features.notes: CDK plans a public skill registry (Q4). If Anthropic ships a native skill marketplace, this becomes redundant.
